parameters.body:
={{ 'Document: ' + $('Parse Classification Result').item.json.documentTitle + '
File: ' + $('Parse Classification Result').item.json.filename + '
Classification: ' + $('Parse Classification Result').item.json.primaryName + ' (' + $('Parse Classification Result').item.json.primaryClassification + ')

Summary: ' + $('Parse Classification Result').item.json.summary }}

parameters.name: Title
parameters.value: ={{ 'PBC Gap Report — ' + $('PBC Gap Analysis').item.json.completionPct + '% Complete (' + $('PBC Gap Analysis').item.json.gapCount + ' items outstanding)' }}
